summary: Spend cap estimates from the actual booked slot duration (not a flat 2h); cancel pages all active bookings and fails fast on a missing CSRF token; spend applies the TaskRabbit all-in fee transform; status is a true cross-source inbox (paginated TaskRabbit + Magic requests persisted locally on send/call/dispatch and refreshed live via GetRequest, since the Magic API has no list endpoint).
reason: TaskRabbit bills by the booked slot duration and honors a per-Tasker 2-hour minimum, stores base hourly rate (not all-in) in booking rows, requires X-CSRF-Token on mutations, and paginates task lists at 50/page; the generated bodies hardcoded a 2h cap estimate, single-page lookups, a soft CSRF path, and base-rate spend totals.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test pass; addresses Greptile PR #1435 P1/P2 findings.
